case_title: GUITY SAAD VS. BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SAAD, GUITY BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETURNED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAAD, GUITY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,664.10 FILED BY SAAD, GUITY AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
